subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and the Tongue of Proof in the Kingdom of Utterance hath voiced these exalted words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی اسمت نزد مظلوم مذکور و لسان برهان در ملکوت بیان باین کلمات عالیات ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women
